prompt: A young adult East Asian woman standing at the beach, close-up to half-length portrait, subject slightly right of center, head slightly turned left, eyes looking into the upper left distance, not directly at the camera, showing a natural gentle smile with teeth slightly visible, look refreshing, bright, and relaxed. She has a soft delicate oval face, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, natural thin eyebrows, a slender nose, and light coral pink lips. Makeup is very light, only natural lashes, slight eyeliner, and soft blush. Fair warm skin tone, retaining real pores, fine vellus hair, natural color variations, and soft highlights—no plastic airbrushing. She has deep black long hair, naturally loose, voluminous with slight waves. A sea breeze blows from the left, lifting strands of hair, some across her cheeks, forehead, and shoulders, maintaining a sense of real weight and random disorder. She wears a white thin embroidered gauze top or blouse, V-shaped overlapping neckline, semi-transparent but modest, soft and flowy fabric, loose sleeves, with delicate white floral embroidery texture. Wearing a short white pearl necklace, right hand lightly resting near the neck or necklace, with a small pearl bracelet on the wrist. Accessories are delicate but not exaggerated. Background is a bright seaside, with softly blurred waves, sea surface reflections, and distant mountains or coastline. Sky is a light grey-blue, sunlight bright but soft, overall high-key exposure, low saturation, low contrast, colors dominated by white, light blue-grey, seawater silver-grey, and natural skin tones. Lighting is natural seaside sunlight, with slight backlighting and side lighting, creating soft highlights on hair edges, facial contours, shoulders, and the white gauze dress. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, clear eyes and face, softly blurred background, realistic seaside lifestyle photography, slight film grain, photorealistic, ultra realistic, natural skin texture. Avoid: Cartoon, CG, illustration, excessive skin smoothing, heavy makeup, exaggerated smiles, incorrect fingers, deformed arms, overexposure to the point of losing detail, strong HDR, over-sharpening, cluttered background, text, watermarks, Logos.

promptZh: 一位年轻的 东亚女性 站在 海滩 上，特写至半身肖像，主体位于画面中心偏右，头部微向左转，双眼看向左上方远方，未直视镜头，展现自然温柔的微笑，微露牙齿，神情清新、明亮且放松。她拥有柔和精致的鹅蛋脸，杏仁状深棕色眼眸，自然的细眉，鼻梁挺拔，唇色为浅珊瑚粉。妆容清淡，仅有自然睫毛、淡淡眼线和柔和腮红。白皙温暖的肤色，保留真实的毛孔、细微绒毛、自然的肤色变化和柔和高光——无塑料感磨皮。她留着深黑色长发，自然披散，发量蓬松且带有微卷。海风从左侧吹来，撩起几缕发丝，散落在脸颊、额头和肩头，保持真实的重量感和随意的凌乱美。她身穿 白色薄款刺绣纱质上衣或衬衫，V 领叠襟设计，半透明但端庄，面料柔软飘逸，袖口宽松，带有精致的白色花卉刺绣纹理。佩戴一条短款珍珠项链，右手轻放在颈部或项链附近，手腕戴着小珍珠手链。配饰精致而不夸张。背景为明亮的海边，海浪虚化柔和，海面波光粼粼，远处可见山峦或海岸线。天空呈浅灰蓝色，阳光明亮而柔和，整体高调曝光，低饱和度，低对比度，色调以白色、浅蓝灰色、海水银灰色和自然肤色为主。光影为自然海边日光，带有轻微逆光和侧光，在发丝边缘、面部轮廓、肩膀和白色纱裙上形成柔和高光。摄影风格：85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，浅景深，眼部和面部清晰，背景虚化柔和，真实的海边生活摄影，轻微胶片颗粒感，照片级真实，超写实，自然皮肤质感。避免：卡通、CG、插画、过度磨皮、浓妆、夸张的笑容、手指错误、手臂变形、过曝导致细节丢失、强 HDR、过度锐化、杂乱背景、文字、水印、Logo。
